Tests to make sure the proper view is used for the data that is received in network panel.

Simple JSON
Testing with MimeType: application/json, and StatusCode: 200
Content: [533,3223]

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget

MIME JSON
Testing with MimeType: application/vnd.document+json, and StatusCode: 200
Content: {"foo0foo": 123}

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget

Simple XML
Testing with MimeType: text/xml, and StatusCode: 200
Content: <bar><foo/></bar>

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget

XML MIME But JSON
Testing with MimeType: text/xml, and StatusCode: 200
Content: {"foo0": "barr", "barr": "fooo"}

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget

HTML MIME But JSON
Testing with MimeType: text/html, and StatusCode: 200
Content: {"hi": "hi"}

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget

TEXT MIME But JSON
Testing with MimeType: text/html, and StatusCode: 200
Content: {"hi": "hi"}

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > json-view vbox widget

HTML MIME With 500 error
Testing with MimeType: text/html, and StatusCode: 500
Content: This
<b>is a </b><br /><br />test.

ResourceType(xhr): vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): vbox widget
ResourceType(document): vbox widget
ResourceType(other): vbox widget

Plain Text MIME But HTML/XML
Testing with MimeType: text/plain, and StatusCode: 200
Content: This
<b>is a </b><br /><br />test.

ResourceType(xhr): vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): vbox widget
ResourceType(document): vbox widget
ResourceType(other): vbox widget

XML With Unknown MIME
Testing with MimeType: text/foobar, and StatusCode: 200
Content: <bar><foo/></bar>

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget

XML With Error 500
Testing with MimeType: text/xml, and StatusCode: 500
Content: <bar><foo/></bar>

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableView > shadow-xml-view source-code widget

Unknown MIME Text With Error 500
Testing with MimeType: text/foobar, and StatusCode: 500
Content: Foo Bar

ResourceType(xhr): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget
ResourceType(document): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget
ResourceType(other): SearchableContainer > SearchableView > vbox widget

Binary Image File
Testing with MimeType: image/png, and StatusCode: 200
Content: Bin**NULL**ary File**NULL****NULL**

ResourceType(xhr): image-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): image-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): image-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): image-view vbox widget

Binary Blank Image File
Testing with MimeType: image/png, and StatusCode: 200
Content: 

ResourceType(xhr): image-view vbox widget
ResourceType(fetch): image-view vbox widget
ResourceType(document): image-view vbox widget
ResourceType(other): image-view vbox widget
